leakage_checks.detail: TARGET not present in feature list
bureau_balance/bureau/installments/CC/POS all aggregate historical records relative to application date. No future-dated records possible in HC public data structure.
categorical_in_features: []. Only numeric features used in g9a_splits.pkl (select_dtypes(include=np.number) applied before split).
Platt sigmoid fit on val_probs+y_val. Test probs transformed by already-fit Platt. Test labels not used during calibration fitting.
SHAP computed post-selection on 500-row test sample for explanability only. Not used in champion selection decision. Champion selected by val AUC + ECE.
All models used eval_set=[(X_val,y_val)] for early stopping. Test set not accessed until final tournament metrics extraction. Test AUC computed post-selection only.
EXT_SOURCE_1/2/3 are external credit bureau scores provided at application time. They are part of the loan application package, not computed after default resolution. No temporal leakage.

GBMs handle NaN natively (no imputation fitted). Behavioral composite inputs fillna(0) is a constant (not learned from data). LR/sklearn baseline uses -999 sentinel (constant). No distributional imputation (mean/median) fitted on any set.
Data spine uses application_train.csv only. application_test.csv has no TARGET column. ID overlap check confirmed 0 overlap. application_test not used in any pipeline step.

known_limitations: bureau/payment aggregates are relative to application date but HC does not provide sub-applicant timestamps — cannot rule out very rare edge cases where a bureau record was created after default (low probability, not addressable with public data)
SHAP was computed on test sample for demo purposes only — this is informational, not model selection
